title: Wilted Zanzibari Wholesome Collards Pilaf
description: A light and romantic Malayan dish featuring collards with a tangy sauce, served as an aromatic side or light meal.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons fish sauce (or soy sauce for lacto-vegetarian option)

instructions: Wash and chop collard greens into bite-sized pieces.
In a small mixing bowl, combine minced garlic, fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and optional red chili flakes. Mix well.
Add chopped collards to the garlic mixture and toss gently to coat.
Rinse rice thoroughly under cold water and drain completely.
Heat butter or coconut oil in a pot over medium heat. Add rinsed rice and stir for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Pour the lime green mixture over the hot rice, mixing well to evenly distribute ingredients.
Cover with a lid and let cook on low-medium heat for 15-20 minutes, or until water is absorbed and rice is fluffy.
Serve hot as a side dish or lightly dressed with a little bit of fresh cilantro leaves.
